data.title: SEC Hosts Third Crypto Policy Roundtable Addressing Custody Issues
data.description:
SEC's third crypto policy roundtable focuses on custody issues, involving major industry names and influencing regulatory clarity.
source: https://coincu.com/332703-sec-third-crypto-custody-roundtable

data.title: Wormhole’s first staking reward (SRP1) has been fully distributed and users must claim it before July 15
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wormhole's first staking reward (SRP1) began to be distributed on January 16, 2025, and has now been fully released. Eligible users must claim unclaimed rewards through the official platform before July 15, 2025 (within 90 days). Unclaimed rewards will be returned to the SRP pool for distribution in future reward cycles.

data.title: Hyperion Completes Strategic Round of Financing, with OKX Ventures and Aptos Labs Joining
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the decentralized trading platform Hyperion announced the completion of a new round of strategic financing, with OKX Ventures and Aptos Labs participating in the investment. This round of financing will accelerate the development of its core products, including the optimization of CLMM centralized liquidity market makers and strategy management tools VAULT, aiming to improve trading efficiency and user experience.
It is reported that Hyperion focuses on the Aptos ecosystem and plans to solve the problem of liquidity dispersion and trading experience optimization through innovation, and expand the user scale. Funds will be used for technology research and development, ecosystem construction, and the launch of user incentive programs such as DRIPs points.

data.title: Trump: Powell is too slow to act and should have learned from the European Central Bank
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said on social media that the European Central Bank is expected to cut interest rates for the seventh time. However, the actions of Federal Reserve Chairman Powell are "too late". He always acts too late and makes wrong decisions. His speech yesterday was a typical and thorough "mess". Oil prices have fallen, grocery prices have fallen, and the United States is profiting greatly from tariffs. The Federal Reserve should have lowered interest rates like the European Central Bank. It should have been done a long time ago, and the Federal Reserve should definitely lower interest rates now. Powell's dismissal cannot be too fast. (Jinshi)

data.title: INIT will be listed on Lbank pre-market on April 11 and will be listed on Binance on April 24
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance Launchpool has launched the latest project - Initia (INIT), and will launch the INIT/USDT trading pair at 19:00 (SGT) on April 24.
According to previous news, LBank has launched Initia (INIT) pre-market trading at 18:00 (SGT) on April 11, 2025, and opened the INIT/USDT trading pair, with the current highest increase of up to 750%.

data.title: Grok Introduces Personalized Conversation Memory Feature
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Grok has launched a conversation memory feature that provides personalized responses when users ask for recommendations or advice. The memory content is transparently displayed, allowing users to see what Grok knows and to delete specific content if desired. Currently in the testing phase, this feature is available on Grok's official website and mobile app, with plans to launch on the X platform in the future.

data.title: sUSD continues to fall and is now trading at $0.773
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that sUSD continues to fall and is currently trading at $0.773, having deviated from its anchor by 22.7%.

data.title: Yang Guo is appointed as HTX DAO Charity Ambassador, and his awarding ceremony will be held via Huobi Live at 18:30 tonight
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official news of Huobi HTX, Yang Guo (@Web3guoer) has officially become the HTX DAO charity ambassador. The awarding ceremony will be held through Huobi Live at 18:30 (UTC+8) tonight. At that time, HTX DAO ambassador Molly (Huobi HTX Liuye) will present Yang Guo with an honorary certificate and SBT medal. Yang Guo will also share his touching experience of helping the blind volunteers for 8 years and convey the power of love. During the live broadcast, there will be a large number of airdrops.

data.title: Binance Pool launches Super Mine event with 5,000 USDT reward
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Pool launched the SuperMine event page and started a new event. During the event (10:00 on April 17, 2025 to 10:00 UTC on May 17, 2025), participants can share a 5,000 USDT token voucher reward pool by increasing BTC computing power. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Some tokens will be removed from Binance Alpha due to technical issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Binance’s announcement, due to technical incompatibility issues, Binance Alpha will remove tokens containing the “transfer tax” mechanism, including GOUT and GAME/GAMEAI, from 19:00 Beijing time on April 17. This mechanism deducts fees from transactions, affecting the consistency of system processing. Users can still sell related tokens through the Binance Exchange Alpha account. Binance said it is communicating with the project party to seek a solution.
